rulings.Case Title: JEREMIAH M CADIGAN VS. TERRY W FONG et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Monday, January 3, 2011, line 1. DEFENDANTS TERRY FONG AND BETSY FONG'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Motion for summary judgment is denied. Motion for summary adjudication is granted in part: The court finds that defendants did not owe plaintiff a duty to protect him from third party criminal activity under Ann M v. Pacific Plaza Shopping Center (1993) 6 Cal. 4th. 666 and its progeny. Summary Adjudication is denied as to duty under Delgado v. Trax Bar & Grill (2005) 36 Cal. 4th. 224. Triable issue of fact raised whether defendants discharged their duty to act reasonably and call the police as the fight unfolded. (Kundra declaration.). =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: ERIC KASTELL et al VS. SALVADOR CHAVEZ et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Amended Notice And Motion To Compel Pltfs To Respond To Deft'S Second Set Of Specially Prepared Interrogatories And For Imposition Of Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Monday, January 3, 2011, line 1. DEFENDANT SALVADOR CHAVEZ Amended Motion To Compel Plaintiffs To Respond To Defendant's Second Set Of Specially Prepared Interrogatories And For Imposition Of Monetary Sanctions. Motion granted as to sanctions. Plaintiffs and/or their counsel of record shall pay defendant $1,600 withing 30 days of notice of this order. Motion to compel is moot. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA VS. THE NORTH RIVER INSURANCE COMPANY
rulings.Calendar Matter: (Amended) Notice Of Motion By Bail Agent To Set Aside Summary Judgment, Vacate Forefeiture And Exonerate The Bond
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Monday, January 3, 2011, line 7. REAL PARTY IN INTEREST BAD BOYS BAIL BONDS' Motion To Set Aside Summary Judgment, Vacate Forefeiture And Exonerate The Bond. Bad Boys' motion to vacate forfeiture and exonerate the bond is Denied. However, summary judgment against Bad Boys is vacated and the judgment is amended by entering summary judgment against the surety: The North River Insurance Company. =(302/CWW)
